title: Position
description: A Position is a named organizational job title — who somebody is on the org chart. Positions carry Roles (access-control grants declared in Product Core DNA) and are referenced by Tasks and Persons. Position is the business-layer identity; Role (Product) is the system-layer access grant.

name.description: The PascalCase name of the position (org-chart title).

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this position is responsible for.

domain.description: The dot-separated domain path this position is scoped to.

reports_to.description: The name of another Position this one reports to (org-chart hierarchy). Optional.

roles.description: Named Roles carried by this Position. These are Product Core Role names — cross-layer references validated against the roles[] array in product.core.json.

examples.name: ClosingSpecialist
examples.description: Closes approved loans and prepares disbursement.

examples.name: LendingManager
examples.description: Operator responsible for the loan origination process.
